title: My Lover Asks Me
content:
My lover asks me:
"What is the difference between me and the sky?"
The difference, my love,
Is that when you laugh,
I forget about the sky.
meaning:
"My Lover Asks Me" is a quintessential example of Nizar Qabbani's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
